description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-sided head with a dark metallic finish and a central golden accent, giving it a distinctive and ornamental appearance. The head is broad and symmetrical, with a cylindrical core and two large, flat striking faces, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty tasks. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of a dark, possibly wooden or composite material, with a textured grip section at the base for secure handling. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced with a metallic collar, enhancing durability and stability. The overall design is both functional and decorative, with a blend of industrial and classical elements. No visible brand markings, wear, or accessories are present, and the hammer appears to be in pristine condition.
description: A heavy-duty, double-sided hammer with a dark metallic head, golden accent, and a long, textured handle. The design is both functional and decorative, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing the narrow profile of the head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the broad, double-sided head with a central golden accent and the symmetrical design of the striking faces.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors view 0, again highlighting the narrow profile of the head and the straight handle.
description_view_3: The rear view matches the front, displaying the wide head and central accent, confirming the symmetrical design.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, dark red handle with a textured, rubberized grip at the base, likely made of wood or composite material.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided sledge-type head with a broad, flat striking face on each side and a central golden accent; designed for heavy impact.
